meta.title: Practical ICS Security: Lessons Learned from 12,000 Deployments
meta.description:
Learn how to determine what is the best equipment for securing your ICS. It is more about truly understanding your people, business processes, and control requirements than a specific technology or vendor.

Yehonaten Kfir of Radiflow spoke at the S4x17 Sponsor Stage about how they help ICS asset owners work through identifying precisely what type of technical solution will meet their most important requirements. The approach is product and vendor neutral, and it will help asset owners drive the process rather than relying on product vendors.
